About Summit Towing

12+ years serving Tulsa and surrounding areas

Founded in 2012, Summit Towing started with two trucks and a commitment to honest service. We've grown by treating every call like it's our neighbor in need.

Our operators train for Tulsa's extreme weather - from summer breakdowns on Route 66 to winter spinouts near the Gathering Place. No job is too complex for our fleet.

We support local first responders and sponsor youth sports teams. When tornadoes hit, our trucks are often first on scene clearing roads.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Summit Towing

Trusted towing professionals serving Tulsa, OK and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.

555-tow-r91
